_comment: Species: Ice Phoenix (冰凰) from Renegade Immortal. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Ice Phoenix

canonical.appearance: Avian 5 m wingspan, feathers crystalline ice-blue, tears freeze the air
canonical.size: 5 m wingspan adult, 600 jin; ancient 20 m, 8000 jin
canonical.behavior: Solitary; nests on glacial peaks; freezes prey then shatters; hoards ice-attribute treasures
canonical.habitat: Snow Domain Country peaks, ice-aspected spirit veins, glacial caves
canonical.diet: ice-attribute herbs, frozen prey, cold-spring fish
canonical.relationships: Rival of flame dragon; tributed by Snow Domain royalty
canonical.bloodline: Ancient Phoenix lineage; ice-attribute true phoenix bloodline (diluted)
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: ice_phoenix — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
